name: Krishnaveni Mudaliyar
eyebrow: Associate Technical Consultant · Dynamics 365 Business Central Developer · Mumbai
tagline: Building business-ready ERP solutions and thoughtful digital experiences — from AL customisations in Business Central to polished modern web interfaces.
about: I'm an Associate Technical Consultant focused on Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central delivery, AL development, and practical ERP consulting. I work at the intersection of business process understanding and technical implementation.
My experience includes custom AL extensions, reporting workflows, business logic design, and modern web development with a strong emphasis on maintainability and usability.

I bring a consulting mindset to every project — translating requirements into structured solutions, designing dependable workflows, and delivering content that is useful to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
My background combines ERP implementation thinking with web engineering, making me comfortable working across business needs, technical execution, and clear communication.
footerSignature: © 2026 Krishnaveni Mudaliyar — Crafted with care in Mumbai
